3. Figure out the asymmetry in my Omegas[a1] vs Omegas[a2] (in the notes - for LeLe and LLLe as well)
5. In the notes, in the expression for sparsity covariance in the LLLe case (and maybe elsewhere), I've left out some redshift bins b)
9. implement full error estimations (done for LeLe, LLLe, 
10. change paralellisation
11. Figure out why I'm getting negative values of the diagonal
13. fix approximations 

Questions:

1. I might need someone to go through and check that my arcmin vs degrees is all fine
2. I changed Theo's sparsity covariance calculation a fair bit, and I need him to check it

SUSPICION!! High integration errors are coming from the weak discontinuity in the correlation function?

Future work:

1.  Parallelise correlation functions calculation (non-trivial)
2. When I move onto 'eeee' etc, I will need to generalise my redshift bin indexing in plotter.ipynb, and elsewhere probably

9. In LLLe, my timing dictionaries assume I have b1 and b2, but actually I only have b1
10. The kernel32 for d needs checking (though it isn't currently being used)

2502.12843 - we can use measurements of the Weyl potential to constrain the 5th force, ie dark matter interactions

Logic -> we measure the Weyl power spectrum, and hence everything which can be learnt from it
